category_sources: Official GitHub README describes erdtree as a filesystem and disk-usage utility.
source_facts.description says it is a file-tree visualizer and disk usage analyzer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is erdtree (erd).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has dedicated usage, installation, and documentation sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/solidiquis/erdtree; repo lookup intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes cross-platform filesystem traversal, disk usage, gitignore handling, and Rust cargo installation.
source_facts.description identifies file-tree visualization and disk-usage analysis.
